fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Add a robotic arm to the four wheeler scene"
"Create a new humanoid robot from scratch"
"Give the four wheeler a more realistic suspension setup"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Make the four wheeler drive forward and turn smoothly"
"Simulate the four wheeler going over a bumpy surface"
"Add gravity and collision effects to the empty room scene"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Add sliders to control the four wheeler's wheels in real time"
"Set up a new scene with obstacles for the vehicle to navigate"
"Try out different wheel sizes and see how it changes the motion"
